mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, total_price, payment_type, payment_subtype, delivery_type, order_state, create_time, update_time, rec_name, rec_address, rec_phone
mapper.insert: insert into orders (id, order_no, user_id, total_price, payment_type, payment_subtype, delivery_type, order_state, create_time, update_time, rec_name, rec_address, rec_phone) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{paymentSubtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deliveryType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{recName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into orders
id,
order_no,
user_id,
total_price,
payment_type,
payment_subtype,
delivery_type,
order_state,
create_time,
update_time,
rec_name,
rec_address,
rec_phone,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{paymentSubtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deliveryType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{orderState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{recName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{recAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{recPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update orders
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
payment_type = #{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
payment_subtype = #{paymentSubtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delivery_type = #{deliveryType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_state = #{orderState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
rec_name = #{recName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rec_address = #{recAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rec_phone = #{recPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update orders set order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, payment_type = #{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, payment_subtype = #{paymentSubtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delivery_type = #{deliveryType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_state = #{orderState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, rec_name = #{recName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rec_address = #{recAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rec_phone = #{recPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select distinct o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.total_price, o.payment_type, o.payment_subtype, o.delivery_type, o.order_state, o.create_time, o.update_time, o.rec_name, o.rec_address, o.rec_phone from orders o inner join order_detail od on o.order_no=od.order_no inner join goods g on od.goods_no=g.goods_no where user_id=#{userId} and g.goods_name like concat('%',#{goodsName},'%') order by create_time desc
